description: Plugin-distributed hooks for embedded-iot-engineering. Auto-merged with the consumer's session hooks on install. Paths use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} so they resolve to the install location.

hooks.comment: Advisory: flags mechanically-detectable embedded anti-patterns (a heavy/blocking call inside an ISR; a TLS/MQTT config with verify=false or a hardcoded key; a connectivity doc with a shared/static provisioning secret). Set EMBEDDED_STRICT=1 to make it blocking.
